entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, explains the platform's design and philosophy

entities.name: Alan
entities.context: Recipient of Careerspan output; likely a hiring manager or client evaluating candidates

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Two-sided talent evaluation platform with candidate coaching interface and employer diagnostic data

entities.name: Two-Sided System
entities.context: Careerspan's core architecture: candidate-facing conversational interface + company-facing diagnostic output

entities.name: Conversational Coaching Interface
entities.context: Candidate side of Careerspan that guides structured self-reflection instead of traditional forms

entities.name: Diagnostic Candidate Data
entities.context: Company side output providing richer evaluation on both skills and subjective signals

entities.name: Story-Based Assessment
entities.context: Candidates tell stories around key skills and experiences rather than just uploading a resume

entities.name: Multilingual Support
entities.context: Careerspan supports 50+ languages so candidates can express themselves comfortably

entities.name: Structured Role Decomposition
entities.context: Output that breaks a role into component skills and competencies for employer evaluation

entities.name: Minimum Engagement Threshold
entities.context: At least two substantive stories and ~40 minutes of interaction required to generate evaluation data

entities.name: ATS Aggregator
entities.context: What Careerspan explicitly is NOT; V distinguishes it from traditional applicant tracking systems

entities.name: AI-Led Conversation
entities.context: The mechanism through which candidates interact with Careerspan after clicking a job board entry

entities.name: Subjective Signal Evaluation
entities.context: Careerspan surfaces subjective candidate signals beyond hard skills for employer review

relationships.context: Founder who designed and explains Careerspan's philosophy and architecture
Core architectural concept: candidate coaching side + employer diagnostic side
V explicitly distinguishes Careerspan as NOT an ATS aggregator
Candidate-facing side uses coaching-style guided self-reflection
Company-facing side delivers richer evaluation data
Candidates prompted to tell stories rather than just upload resumes
AI guides candidate through structured conversation after account creation
Requires ~40 min and two substantive stories for sufficient evaluation data
Output breaks roles into component skills and competencies
Receives structured candidate evaluation output from Careerspan
Receives role breakdown showing candidate skill gaps
V believes storytelling reveals candidate quality better than traditional forms
Employer output includes both skills data and subjective signals
